heading: Agreements to effectuate leases
label: 47–4 Agreements to effectuate leases
text: The Secretary of the Interior may enter into agreements with other Federal agencies and with any concessioner or its successor in order to effectuate the purposes of sections 47–2 to 47–6 of this title.
notes: CodificationSection was classified to prior to renumbering by .section 47–2(b) of this titlePub. L. 99–542
